title: Our Customer Reviews - Tours Northwest - Seattle, WA
content: The PERFECT way to see Rainier if you don’t have access to a car. Our tour guide, John, was so knowledgeable and kind and took us to so many great spots. You could tell that he really loved the park and wanted us to have a great time. We loved having the free time to walk around and explore on our own at Paradise. It was a great mix of being with the group while also getting to do some of your own adventuring. #### Great Time. We were blessed to have an absolutely beautiful day. Our tour guide Jeff was wonderful . Knowledgeable, many anecdotes about the city , and the history. Also took us through many of the the surrounding communities and their contributions to the growth of Seattle. I was in Seattle for a short period of time and wanted to get out of the city for a day. #### GREAT TOUR AND GUIDE. We had a great tour of Seattle!

title: Rio Tinto Kennecott visitor experience | Global
content: We’re on a mission to become the world’s most valued metals and mining business – for the people who invest in us, the people we work and partner with, and the communities around us. We operate in 35 countries where our 60,000+ employees are working to find better ways to provide the materials the world needs. Continuous improvement and innovation are part of our DNA. We supply the metals and minerals used to help the world grow and decarbonise. The lightest of all metals, it is a key element needed for low-carbon technologies. Bringing to market materials critical to urbanisation and the transition to a low-carbon economy. One of the most modern, safe and sustainable operations in the world. While iron ore is central to our operations in WA, we have a diverse presence across the state, from salt, lithium, our diamond legacy and our promising copper-gold project. **The Rio Tinto Kennecott Visitor Experience is now open.**.
